summary: Iteration 90: Auth migration (SHA256->bcrypt), auto-seed, error messages, and SEO tests completed. Backend: 19/20 tests passed (95%). All CRITICAL auth tests PASSED. One minor SEO meta tag inconsistency detected.

issues: og:description and twitter:description have different content - MINOR SEO issue (source file looks correct, may be caching)
Cookie consent banner blocks bottom of page until dismissed - minor UX issue (same as iteration 89)

ceo_auth.POST /api/auth/login ceo: PASSED - Returns user data for ceo@manoprotect.com

bcrypt_hashing.login_after_seed: PASSED - Login works with bcrypt hashed passwords

frontend_gestion_login.page_loads: PASSED - /gestion/login page loads with email/password fields
frontend_gestion_login.admin_login: PASSED - Admin login redirects to /gestion/admin dashboard

action_items: MINOR: Sync og:description and twitter:description meta tags in index.html (may require frontend rebuild)
critical_code_review_comments: bcrypt migration working correctly - _verify_hash supports both bcrypt and SHA256 fallback
Auto-upgrade mechanism in login works - SHA256 hashes are upgraded to bcrypt on successful login
seed-admin endpoint correctly creates/updates 3 default users with bcrypt hashes
Error messages are specific: 'Contraseña incorrecta' vs 'Usuario no encontrado' vs 'Usuario desactivado'
RBAC correctly enforces admin-only access to /api/gestion/usuarios
SEO files (robots.txt, sitemap.xml) properly configured with /gestion/ disallow and /familia allow
seed_data_creation: seed-admin endpoint creates/updates: admin@manoprotect.com, comercial@manoprotect.com, instalador@manoprotect.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 90 tested auth migration from SHA256 to bcrypt. All 3 gestion users (admin, comercial, instalador) login correctly. CEO auth works. Error messages are specific. Auto-seed working. RBAC enforced. SEO files configured correctly. Minor meta tag inconsistency detected (og vs twitter description).
features_verified: CRITICAL: Gestion Admin login POST /api/gestion/auth/login with admin@manoprotect.com / ManoAdmin2025! returns token
CRITICAL: Gestion Comercial login with comercial@manoprotect.com / Comercial2025! returns token with rol=comercial
CRITICAL: Gestion Instalador login with instalador@manoprotect.com / Instalador2025! returns token with rol=instalador
CRITICAL: CEO login POST /api/auth/login with ceo@manoprotect.com / 19862210Des returns user data
AUTH ERROR: Wrong password returns 401 with detail 'Contraseña incorrecta'
AUTH ERROR: Non-existent email returns 401 with detail 'Usuario no encontrado'
AUTO-SEED: POST /api/gestion/seed-admin updates existing users and creates missing ones
BCRYPT: Passwords are hashed with bcrypt (login works after seed)
RBAC: Admin token can access GET /api/gestion/usuarios
RBAC: Comercial token CANNOT access GET /api/gestion/usuarios (403)
SEO: GET /robots.txt contains Disallow /gestion/ and Allow /familia
SEO: HTML page contains GA4 ID G-8KECMQS45X and GTM GTM-MK53XZ8Q
Frontend: /gestion/login page loads and accepts credentials
